toolbox_name: SparkFun ZX Distance and Gesture Sensor

zx_sensor_init.tooltip: Create and initialize ZX distance and gesture sensor (I2C)

zx_sensor_position_available.tooltip: Check if ZX sensor has new position data

zx_sensor_gesture_available.tooltip: Check if ZX sensor has new gesture data

zx_sensor_read_gesture.tooltip: Read gesture type detected by ZX sensor (1=swipe right 2=swipe left 3=push up 4=hover)
